cases.question: What was Apple's net income in fiscal 2023?
cases.answer:
**Apple Inc. — Net Income, Fiscal Year 2023**

| Metric | Value |
|---|---|
| Net Income (FY2023) | **$96,995,000,000** (~$96.995 billion) |

This figure is sourced from Apple's fiscal year 2023 10-K filing. Note that Apple's fiscal year ends in late September (FY2023 ended September 30, 2023).
notes: unsupported: ["This figure is sourced from Apple's fiscal year 2023 10-K filing", "Apple's fiscal year ends in late September (FY2023 ended September 30, 2023)"]

cases.question: What was Apple's total revenue in fiscal 2024?
cases.answer:
**Apple Inc. — Total Revenue, Fiscal Year 2024**

| Metric | Value |
|---|---|
| Total Net Revenue (FY2024) | **$391,035,000,000** ($391.035 billion) |

> **Note on fiscal year:** Apple's fiscal year 2024 ended on **September 28, 2024** (Apple's fiscal year ends in late September, not December 31).

This figure is sourced directly from Apple's FY2024 10-K filing financial data.

cases.question: How much did Tesla spend on research and development in fiscal 2023?
cases.answer:
**Tesla, Inc. — Research & Development Expenses, Fiscal Year 2023**

| Fiscal Year | R&D Expenses |
|-------------|-------------|
| 2023 | **$3,969,000,000** (~$3.969 billion) |

Tesla's research and development expenses for fiscal year 2023 were **$3,969,000,000 ($3.969 billion)**, as reported in its FY2023 10-K filing.

cases.question: What were JPMorgan's total assets at the end of fiscal 2023?
cases.answer: JPMorgan Chase's total assets at the end of fiscal year 2023 (December 31, 2023) were **$3,875,393,000,000 (approximately $3.875 trillion)**.

cases.answer: Tesla, Inc.'s **diluted earnings per share (EPS) for fiscal year 2023** was **$4.30 per share**, as reported in its 10-K filing.
